calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Vacated

Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Mollie Burks for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NORMA GOMEZ's Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement:

Plaintiff Norma Gomez's unopposed "motion for approval of PAGA settlement" is granted.

Counsel for movant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the adopted ruling.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Set For Trial On Nov-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
